name: Quadrium
short_description: Quadrium is a fiddly match-3 game. Clear the board by dropping the tiles off the edges. Various bonuses like boxes, glass, fog, static tiles and portals add variety to the gameplay. Juicy and soft graphics, relaxing music and no time limit allow you to enjoy the innovative gameplay.
detailed_description: Quadrium is a fiddly match-3 game. The aim of the game is to clear the board by dropping the tiles off the edges. Various bonuses like boxes, glass, fog, redirecting arrows, static tiles and portals add variety to the gameplay. Juicy and soft graphics, relaxing music and no time limit allow you to enjoy the innovative gameplay to the full. Relax and have fun!
about_the_game: Quadrium is a fiddly match-3 game. The aim of the game is to clear the board by dropping the tiles off the edges. Various bonuses like boxes, glass, fog, redirecting arrows, static tiles and portals add variety to the gameplay. Juicy and soft graphics, relaxing music and no time limit allow you to enjoy the innovative gameplay to the full. Relax and have fun!
supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Dutch, Japanese, Russian, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support
